This indicates CMS data is available and queryable.\\n2) Live route behavior: /chairs and /desks currently return valid CSS+JS assets (200).\\n3) Critical inconsistency detected: / (homepage) HTML references stale CSS/JS chunk hashes that return 404. - sanity/schemas/category.ts (mainImage field if exists)

- Migration script (new)
